{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321215109D3263C70F0B6B2CAC670"}"},"total":800},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7533298152999256857","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"讲述主角轮回就是九十九世众人成就仙人，当了九十八世的反派，在最后九十九世被系统做局，女主们都觉醒了，各个女主因为之前的一些误会，直接反悔了，每个都反目成仇对付原男主，挺经典的未婚妻，师妹 师尊，师姐，原男主的青梅，师姐的妹妹，其他宗门女主，反正就是一堆，非常推荐各位来看，评分低是因为更新慢了点，但是故事情节还是非常的好看的[书架加一][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][求爆更]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753992920,"group_id":"7399223771791379518","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"互关，，互相点，，赞，OK吗?我会定期检查谁取关的，别想蒙混过关","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7rmi5geF9Y0fh6cvYsZMYn8gDHkl1uvf+U6ewxid1Xr","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0c30a633b768402aae1437a283454d17~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617481&x-signature=TX5y4eGakDNbvRmfi%2FPol%2BJX%2BhU%3D","user_id":"3105493641082560","user_name":"《小鑫》"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3105493641082560","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7399223771791379518","book_info":{"abstract":"本书又名：【不科学啊！这届女主都自带系统？】
【反派摆烂了，女主觉醒系统后全倒贴？】
秦渊穿越异世界，绑定了辅助反派系统，成为了一名大反派。
只要轮回九十九世扮演反派，帮助九十九个气运之子走完剧情，自己就能成为仙帝。
“不就是当九十九次炮灰反派吗？多大个事！”
九十八世的轮回，秦渊顺利完成。
正当他自信满满的迎接最后一世轮回之时，却感觉到不对劲？
“顾清雪，你不是应该和我退婚吗？你躺在我床上干什么？”
“南宫琉璃，你是不是搞错了？
你可是男主的小迷妹啊，你要为了他杀我才对啊，你杀他干什么？”
“楚牧月！你可是男主的未婚妻，你这样是给他戴绿帽子！”
“师尊！我可是你的徒弟啊，我们绝对不能这样……你不要过来啊啊啊……”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/589112abab990ee3955d2e8139c335cd","author":"象拔蚌战神","author_id":"","book_id":"7399223771791379518","book_name":"我是反派啊，女主攻略我干嘛？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7399223928129847870","read_count":"30321","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"745594"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"367","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,多女主,反派","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4093f4bb4bd11e02c919843ae9ce4243~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285070&x-signature=fVcIA0%2BMsNvxP71t7K0RWfb8Gn8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"119220615517695","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"244"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321215109D3263C70F0B6B2CAC670"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":22,"forwarded_cou
